title: Advanced Dynamic Programming and State Compression · Invariant Lens: Space Compression
summary: Scale sequence alignment and constrained-selection models beyond naive tables. Planned artifact: Add and verify the dsa2 space compression increment in an optimized DP with equivalence evidence. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Compress DP rows only when overwritten states are no longer needed.
Distinguish zero-one, unbounded, subset-sum, and value-indexed knapsack states.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
